archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Developer Tools in Dark Mode)
vibe: Professional, technical, precise, and highly functional command-center. Deep blacks, sharp borders.

monospace.usage: Code blocks, tool call logs, file paths, IDs

layout_system.grid: Control Room Grid (Dense, sharp borders, high utility)

structure.app_container: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50
structure.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 flex flex-col hidden md:flex
structure.chat_panel: flex-1 md:max-w-md lg:max-w-lg border-r border-zinc-800 flex flex-col bg-zinc-950 relative

spacing.dense: p-2 gap-2 (for sidebar items, tool calls)
spacing.standard: p-4 gap-4 (for chat bubbles, input area)

borders.radius: rounded-md (Keep it sharp, avoid heavily rounded pills)

surface_strategies.panels: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Panels separated by 1px solid zinc-800. No shadows for main panels.
surface_strategies.tool_calls: Retro-Futurism/Terminal look. Deep black background (bg-black), 1px solid border, monospace text.
surface_strategies.chat_input: Floating above the chat area with a subtle dark gradient mask at the top to fade out scrolling text.
surface_strategies.preview_browser: Neumorphism/Tactile variant. Header of the preview panel resembles a minimal browser tab bar with URL input and refresh buttons.

components_usage.Button: Shadcn Button. Use 'ghost' for sidebar/menu items. Use 'default' (blue) only for primary actions.
components_usage.Input: Shadcn Input. Must have focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-blue-500. Chat textarea should auto-resize.
components_usage.ScrollArea: Shadcn ScrollArea for chat history and sidebar lists. Customize scrollbar to be very thin, dark gray.
components_usage.Tabs: Shadcn Tabs for the Preview Panel (Preview | Code | Console). Use underlined tabs rather than pill tabs for a more IDE-like feel.
components_usage.Sheet: Shadcn Sheet for mobile navigation (Hamburger menu). Slides in from the left containing the sidebar content.
components_usage.Collapsible: Shadcn Collapsible for Tool Calls. Header shows tool name and status (running/completed). Content shows raw JSON or console logs.

ai_chat.user_message: Aligned right or distinct background (bg-zinc-800). Max-width 85%.
ai_chat.ai_response: Aligned left, transparent background. Uses markdown formatting.
ai_chat.streaming: A subtle pulsing cursor at the end of the streaming text.

tool_calls_display.running: Amber border or blue glow, spinning icon (lucide-loader-2), text 'Executing...'
tool_calls_display.completed: Green check or subtle gray background, collapsible to see 'Input' and 'Output' in JetBrains Mono font.

live_preview_panel.browser_header: bg-zinc-900 border-b border-zinc-800 p-2 flex items-center gap-2.
live_preview_panel.url_bar: bg-zinc-950 rounded-md px-3 py-1 text-xs text-zinc-400 font-mono w-full max-w-sm truncate
live_preview_panel.iframe_container: bg-white w-full h-full flex-1. Wrap in a container that handles loading states gracefully.

chat_history_sidebar.grouping: Overlines (text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-500 mb-2 mt-4).
chat_history_sidebar.items: text-sm text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white rounded-md p-2 flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer truncate.

authentication.layout: Centered card on a dark gradient background.
authentication.form: Minimal, dense inputs with a primary CTA button.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and list items must have distinct hover states (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200).
motion_and_interactions.tool_animations: Use framer-motion or simple CSS transitions for smooth height expansion when expanding tool call logs. Add `animate-pulse` to running tool indicators.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-zinc-400 against bg-zinc-950 meets 4.5:1 ratio. If not, use zinc-300.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="chat-input-textarea"`, `data-testid="new-chat-btn"`, `data-testid="preview-iframe"`).

logo_url.description: A black and white abstract geometry logo for the app branding in the sidebar header.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for all base components, but override the default rounding to `rounded-md` or `rounded-sm` for a sharper, more technical IDE feel.
Install `react-markdown` and `remark-gfm` for rendering AI responses, and configure `@tailwindcss/typography` with `prose-invert` for dark mode.
Ensure the layout is robust: The left panel (Chat) should flex-shrink, and the right panel (Preview) should flex-grow. The chat area MUST be scrollable while the input remains fixed at the bottom.
For the E2B sandbox preview, handle the iframe loading state gracefully (show a spinner or a 'Starting Sandbox...' overlay).
Tool calls must be visually distinct from conversational text. Use accordion/collapsible blocks with monospace font.
Since it's a 'hybrid_fullstack' app, make sure to wire up authentication (Login/Register screens) using a simple, centered card layout matching the dark theme.
